title: nonatelia terniflora
intro: Nonatelia terniflora, also known as the Chinese dragon flower or Chinese dragon tree, is a plant species in the genus Nonatelia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nonatelia terniflora include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Nonatelia terniflora typically involve brewing the flowers or leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's extracts as a supplement.
